meta.description: Inbound form → Claude classify → Claude draft → log + Telegram approval (business hours) or immediate generic send (out-of-hours). This workflow is itself a demo of the 4-layer framework customers see on the site.

parameters.responseBody: ={ {"success": true, "message": "Thanks. Isaiah will be in touch shortly."} }

nodes.name: Log to Sheet
nodes.notes: Sheet columns required: lead_id, timestamp, name, email, phone, service, budget, message, how_heard, source, icp_class, priority, industry_archetype, scaffold, draft_subject, draft_body, confidence, notes_for_isaiah, mode, status

nodes.name: Gmail: Send Draft Now (OOH)
nodes.notes: Out-of-hours: send the Scaffold D acknowledgement immediately. Isaiah follows up in the morning.

nodes.name: Telegram: FYI (OOH)
nodes.notes: Chat ID is Isaiah's personal chat. Get it by messaging @userinfobot, then set env TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID or hardcode here.
